remediation: Preserve V1.1 unchanged; create V1.2 with seed43 enforced before any production model/backbone construction, regression test it, and rerun all preflight/freeze/review gates.
technical_root_cause: HF ESM2 pooler weights are absent from the pretrained checkpoint and are randomly initialized. V1.1 seeded only inside run_fold_core, after prepare_production_inputs had already constructed the backbone, so the pretraining and production runtime backbone hashes differed.
